name: documentary-pipeline-remotion
description: Motion-graphics-first documentary video pipeline — Phase 0 quality proof

scripts.render: npx remotion render src/index.ts DocumentaryPhase0 out/phase0-proof.mp4 --codec=h264
scripts.render:prores: npx remotion render src/index.ts DocumentaryPhase0 out/phase0-proof.mov --codec=prores
